'''âng-j-z-s''' ('''kangajzesoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:jailbreak|jailbreak]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-j-z-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:jailbreak|jailbreak]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âng-j-z-s
|-
! Lemma
| kangajzesoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
